blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,592 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 56".
